select_when: Recurring failures keep surfacing as different symptoms even though the same underlying mechanism is likely recreating the problem.
The next action should change the machine, not just fix the individual case, because process design, ownership, incentives, or environment will recreate the failure.
The apparent cause is too close to the event and is probably proximate, emotionally satisfying, or politically convenient rather than truly generative.
A problem of real consequence is too complex to solve without first being cleaved into logical, manageable parts.
avoid_when: The team is jumping into analysis prematurely without specifying the underlying problem structure or the decision output needed.
The situation depends on several interacting causes, handoffs, or incentive failures and the analysis is forcing one neat root cause anyway.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model centered on proximate-versus-root diagnosis, machine-level causation, and anti-symptom chasing rather than on generic troubleshooting rhetoric.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor-style operational checklists because the raw source is stronger on causal diagnosis, logic trees, and anti-jumping-to-conclusions discipline.
Did not add higher-order fields because this batch stays inside the frozen Wave 1 to Wave 3 contracts.
open_questions: The typed fields are reviewed operational compression over a source that spans consulting diagnosis, systems improvement, and behavioral analysis.

select_when.note: The raw strengths section is explicit on recurring symptoms, machine-level change, and cases where the first explanation is too proximate.

avoid_when.note: Both anti-activation conditions are directly supported by the source warnings on premature analysis and forcing a single cause over a causal stack.

input_type.note: The source clearly activates on diagnosis of recurring symptoms and hidden drivers, but the compact input label is reviewed normalization.

output_type.note: The raw source produces causal chains and root-driver diagnosis; the output label compresses that into a typed mapping artifact.

reasoning_types.note: RCA clearly uses causal and diagnostic reasoning, but the taxonomy labels remain reviewed normalization.
